title: Provider Registration - Complete Successful Flow
description: Verify that a provider can successfully complete all 5 steps of the registration flow with valid inputs and activate their profile.

steps.description: Navigate to provider registration start screen
Fill in valid personal info on Step 1 and proceed
Fill in valid business details on Step 2 and proceed
Add required services on Step 3 and proceed
Upload verification documents on Step 4 and proceed
Review and confirm registration summary on Step 5
Verify profile status is activated and provider can access dashboard

title: Provider Registration - Validation on Required Fields
description: Verify validation errors are shown and submission is blocked when required fields are missing or invalid on all 5 steps of provider registration.

steps.description: Navigate to Step 1 of provider registration
Attempt to proceed with empty required personal info fields
Check validation errors prevent moving forward
Fill Step 1 valid data and proceed to Step 2
Leave required business details empty and attempt to proceed
Validation errors displayed and progression blocked
Fill valid data on Step 2 and proceed to Step 3
Try to proceed without adding any services
Service addition required validation error displayed
Add at least one valid service and proceed to Step 4
Attempt to proceed without uploading verification documents
Validation error for missing verification documents shown

title: Service Management - Add New Service with Valid Data
description: Verify providers can add new services with valid inputs, and the service appears correctly in the list with a valid UUID.

steps.description: Navigate to Service Management screen
Click 'Add Service' to open add service screen
Fill in valid service details (name, description, price)
Submit new service
Verify new service is listed with a valid UUID and correct data

title: Service Management - Edit Existing Service
description: Verify providers can edit existing services and changes are saved and reflected properly with maintained valid UUID.

steps.description: Navigate to Service Management screen
Select an existing service from the list
Edit service details (e.g. price or description) with valid inputs
Save changes
Verify service list shows updated details and UUID remains valid

title: Service Management - Delete Existing Service
description: Verify providers can delete a service and it gets removed from the service list.

steps.description: Navigate to Service Management screen
Select an existing service
Delete the service and confirm deletion
Verify service is no longer listed

title: Service Management - Add/Edit Service with Invalid UUID
description: Ensure that invalid UUID formats are rejected during service creation or updates and appropriate validation errors are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to add service screen
Attempt to submit service record with invalid UUID
Validation error for invalid UUID format is displayed, submission blocked
Navigate to edit existing service screen
Attempt to save service with corrupted or invalid UUID
Validation error is shown, and save is prevented

title: Authentication - Successful Login and Session Persistence
description: Verify users can log in with valid credentials, maintain session persistence after app restart, and navigate to their respective dashboards.

steps.description: Navigate to login screen
Input valid username/email and password
Submit login form
Verify successful login and redirection to user dashboard
Restart the application
Verify user session is persisted and user remains logged in

title: Authentication - Login Failure with Invalid Credentials
description: Verify appropriate error messages are shown and login is prevented when invalid or unregistered credentials are provided.

steps.description: Navigate to login screen
Input invalid username/email and/or password
Attempt to login
Verify error message indicating invalid credentials is displayed and login is blocked

title: Provider Dashboard - Display Accurate Appointments and Financial Data
description: Verify provider dashboard correctly displays real-time appointment data, accurate financial summaries including earnings and vouchers.

steps.description: Login as a provider
Navigate to provider dashboard
Verify appointments list reflects current and upcoming bookings accurately
Verify financial summaries match backend data including earnings and vouchers

title: Provider Dashboard - Manage Profile and Services
description: Verify providers can update profile settings and service offerings from the dashboard and changes reflect immediately.

steps.description: Login as provider and access dashboard
Navigate to profile settings from dashboard
Edit profile details with valid data and save
Verify profile changes are saved and displayed
Navigate to service management from dashboard
Add or update services
Verify service updates are reflected in the provider's list

title: Client - Discover Providers Using Map and Filters
description: Verify clients can discover local hair service providers using the map interface and apply filters to refine search results.

steps.description: Login as client
Access provider discovery map
Observe local providers displayed on map
Apply filters (e.g. service type, price range)
Verify map updates to show providers matching filters only

title: Client - Book Appointment with Real-time Availability
description: Verify clients can select appointment times based on real-time provider availability and complete the booking process successfully.

steps.description: Login as client and select a provider
View provider's available appointment slots
Select a valid available slot
Complete booking with required details
Verify booking confirmation received and appointment is recorded

title: Booking - Handle Booking Attempt for Taken Time Slot
description: Verify system prevents double booking by handling cases where a user tries to book a time slot that has become unavailable after selection.

steps.description: Client selects an available appointment slot
Simulate another user booking the same slot concurrently
Client attempts to complete booking process
Verify error is shown indicating slot no longer available and booking is blocked

title: Payments - Successful Secure Payment Processing
description: Verify client payments are processed securely and successfully with confirmation and receipt generation.

steps.description: Complete appointment booking flow up to payment step
Enter valid payment details
Submit payment
Verify payment success confirmation and receipt availability

title: Payments - Payment Failure Handling
description: Verify appropriate error messages and recovery options are provided for payment failures due to invalid data or network errors.

steps.description: Attempt payment with invalid card details or expired payment method
Verify error message indicating payment failure is displayed and user can retry
Attempt payment with valid details but simulate network failure
Verify network error notification and option to retry payment

title: Client - Manage Favorites List
description: Verify clients can add providers to favorites, view their favorites list, and remove providers as desired.

steps.description: Login as client
Navigate to a provider profile and add to favorites
Access favorites list
Verify added provider appears in favorites list
Remove provider from favorites list
Verify provider is no longer in favorites list

title: In-app Messaging Between Client and Provider
description: Verify that clients and providers can exchange messages within the app, and messages are sent, received, and displayed correctly in real time.

steps.description: Login as client and open messaging with a provider
Send a message to provider
Verify message is delivered and displayed in conversation
Login as provider and respond to the client message
Verify client receives provider's message in real time

title: Subscription - Enforce Feature Access Based on Subscription Tier
description: Verify that providers have access only to features corresponding to their subscription tier and any commission rates are correctly applied.

steps.description: Login as provider with basic subscription tier
Attempt to access premium features restricted to higher tiers
Verify access denied messages or UI disables premium features
Check commission rates applied on provider financials correspond to subscription tier
Verify commission rates match expected values for subscription tier

title: Provider Calendar Management - Add and Modify Availability
description: Verify providers can add, edit, and remove availability slots on their calendar and changes are saved correctly.

steps.description: Login as provider and navigate to calendar management
Add new availability slot with valid date and time
Verify new slot appears correctly in calendar
Edit existing availability slot
Verify slot updates are saved and displayed
Remove availability slot
Verify slot is removed from calendar

title: Provider Portfolio Uploads - Manage Portfolio Entries
description: Verify providers can upload, view, and delete portfolio items from their dashboard.

steps.description: Login as provider and navigate to portfolio management
Upload one or more portfolio items with valid data
Verify uploaded portfolio items are displayed correctly
Delete a portfolio item
Verify the portfolio item is removed
